Require Import
  HoTT.Classes.implementations.peano_naturals
  HoTT.Classes.implementations.natpair_integers
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.abstract_algebra
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.naturals

  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.orders

  HoTT.Classes.orders.dec_fields

  HoTT.Classes.theory.additional_operations
  HoTT.Classes.tactics.ring_quote
  HoTT.Classes.tactics.ring_tac.
Record Qpos@{} : Type@{UQ} := mkQpos { pos : Q; is_pos : 0 < pos }.
#[export] Instance Qpos_Q@{} : Cast Qpos Q := pos.
Lemma Qpos_plus_pr@{} : forall a b : Qpos, 0 < 'a + 'b.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : Q+, 0 < ' a + ' b
forall a b : Q+, 0 < ' a + ' b

contents: #[export] Instance Qpos_plus@{} : Plus Qpos := fun a b => mkQpos _ (Qpos_plus_pr a b).

#[export] Instance pos_is_pos@{} : forall q : Q+, PropHolds (0 < ' q)
  := is_pos.
Lemma pos_eq@{} : forall a b : Q+, @paths Q (' a) (' b) -> a = b.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : Q+, ' a = ' b -> a = b
forall a b : Q+, ' a = ' b -> a = b
{| pos := a; is_pos := Ea |} = {| pos := b; is_pos := Eb |}

hypotheses.type: ' {| pos := a; is_pos := Ea |} = ' {| pos := b; is_pos := Eb |}

goals.conclusion: {| pos := a; is_pos := Ea |} = {| pos := b; is_pos := Eb |}
Reflexive (fun e d : Q+ => ' e = ' d)
forall x y : Q+, IsHProp (' x = ' y)
forall x y : Q+, ' x = ' y -> x = y
Reflexive (fun e d : Q+ => ' e = ' d)
forall x y : Q+, IsHProp (' x = ' y)
forall x y : Q+, ' x = ' y -> x = y
forall x y : Q+, x + y = y + x

contents: set (K := naturals_to_semiring nat Q (S k)) in *;clearbody K.
Lemma pos_recip_r@{} : forall e : Q+, e / e = 1.

goals.conclusion:
' e *
' {| pos := / ' e; is_pos := pos_dec_recip_compat (' e) (pos_is_pos e) |} = 1

contents: Lemma pos_recip_r'@{} : forall e : Q+, @paths Q (' e / ' e) 1.
Lemma pos_mult_1_r@{} : forall e : Q+, e * 1 = e.
Lemma pos_split2@{} : forall e : Q+, e = e / 2 + e / 2.

goals.conclusion: forall e : Q+, e = e / 2 + e / 2
forall e : Q+, e = e / 2 + e / 2

contents: Lemma pos_split3@{} : forall e : Q+, e = e / 3 + e / 3 + e / 3.

goals.conclusion: forall e : Q+, e = e / 3 + e / 3 + e / 3
forall e : Q+, e = e / 3 + e / 3 + e / 3
forall x y z : Q+, x * (y * z) = x * y * z
forall x y z : Q+, x + (y + z) = x + y + z

contents:
Lemma pos_recip_through_plus@{} : forall a b c : Q+,
  a + b = c * (a / c + b / c).

goals.conclusion: forall a b c : Q+, a + b = c * (a / c + b / c)
forall a b c : Q+, a + b = c * (a / c + b / c)
a + b = c * (a / c + b / c)

contents: Lemma pos_unconjugate@{} : forall a b : Q+, a * b / a = b.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : Q+, (a * b) / a = b
forall a b : Q+, (a * b) / a = b
forall a b c : Q+, a * (b + c) = a * b + a * c

contents:
Lemma Q_sum_eq_join_meet@{} : forall a b c d : Q, a + b = c + d ->
  a + b = join a c + meet b d.

goals.conclusion: forall a b c d : Q, a + b = c + d -> a + b = a ⊔ c + (b ⊓ d)
forall a b c d : Q, a + b = c + d -> a + b = a ⊔ c + (b ⊓ d)

contents:
Lemma Qpos_sum_eq_join_meet@{} : forall a b c d : Q+, a + b = c + d ->
  a + b = join a c + meet b d.

goals.conclusion: forall a b c d : Q+, a + b = c + d -> a + b = a ⊔ c + (b ⊓ d)
forall a b c d : Q+, a + b = c + d -> a + b = a ⊔ c + (b ⊓ d)

  exists c ca cb, a = c + ca /\ b = c + cb.

goals.conclusion: {c : Q+ & {ca : Q+ & {cb : Q+ & ((a = plus c ca) * (b = plus c cb))%type}}}

(a = a / 2 + a / 2) *
(b =
 a / 2 +

   pos := ' (a / 2) + (' b - ' a);
   is_pos :=
     nonneg_plus_lt_compat_r 0 (' (a / 2)) (' b - ' a)
       (snd (flip_nonneg_minus (' a) (' b)) E) (pos_is_pos (a / 2))
 |})

b =
a / 2 +
{|
  pos := ' (a / 2) + (' b - ' a);
  is_pos :=
    nonneg_plus_lt_compat_r 0 (' (a / 2)) (' b - ' a)
      (snd (flip_nonneg_minus (' a) (' b)) E) (pos_is_pos (a / 2))
|}

b =
a / 2 +
{|
  pos := ' (a / 2) + (' b - ' a);
  is_pos :=
    nonneg_plus_lt_compat_r 0 (' (a / 2)) (' b - ' a)
      (snd (flip_nonneg_minus (' a) (' b)) E) (pos_is_pos (a / 2))
|}

' b =
' (a / 2 +
   {|
     pos := ' (a / 2) + (' b - ' a);
     is_pos :=
       nonneg_plus_lt_compat_r 0 (' (a / 2)) (' b - ' a)
         (snd (flip_nonneg_minus (' a) (' b)) E) (pos_is_pos (a / 2))
   |})

' b =
' (a / 2) +
' {|
    pos := ' (a / 2) + (' b - ' a);
    is_pos :=
      nonneg_plus_lt_compat_r 0 (' (a / 2)) (' b - ' a)
        (snd (flip_nonneg_minus (' a) (' b)) E)
        (pos_mult_compat (' a) (' (/ 2)) (pos_is_pos a)
           (pos_dec_recip_compat (' 2) (Qpos_plus_pr 1 1)))
  |}

Lemma Qpos_lt_min@{} : forall a b : Q+, exists c ca cb : Q+,
  a = c + ca /\ b = c + cb.

goals.conclusion:
forall a b : Q+,
{c : Q+ & {ca : Q+ & {cb : Q+ & ((a = plus c ca) * (b = plus c cb))%type}}}

forall a b : Q+,
{c : Q+ & {ca : Q+ & {cb : Q+ & ((a = plus c ca) * (b = plus c cb))%type}}}

{c : Q+ & {ca : Q+ & {cb : Q+ & ((a = plus c ca) * (b = plus c cb))%type}}}
{c : Q+ & {ca : Q+ & {cb : Q+ & ((a = plus c ca) * (b = plus c cb))%type}}}
{c : Q+ & {ca : Q+ & {cb : Q+ & ((a = plus c ca) * (b = plus c cb))%type}}}
{c : Q+ & {ca : Q+ & {cb : Q+ & ((a = plus c ca) * (b = plus c cb))%type}}}
{c : Q+ & {ca : Q+ & {cb : Q+ & ((a = plus c ca) * (b = plus c cb))%type}}}

goals.conclusion:
{c0 : Q+ &
{ca0 : Q+ & {cb0 : Q+ & ((a = plus c0 ca0) * (b = plus c0 cb0))%type}}}

contents: Definition Qpos_diff : forall q r : Q, q < r -> Q+.

goals.conclusion: forall q r : Q, q < r -> Q+
forall q r : Q, q < r -> Q+

contents: Lemma Qpos_diff_pr@{} : forall q r E, r = q + ' (Qpos_diff q r E).

goals.conclusion: forall (q r : Q) (E : q < r), r = q + ' Qpos_diff q r E
forall (q r : Q) (E : q < r), r = q + ' Qpos_diff q r E
r = q + ' Qpos_diff q r E

contents: Lemma Qmeet_plus_l : forall a b c : Q, meet (a + b) (a + c) = a + meet b c.

goals.conclusion: forall a b c : Q, (a + b) ⊓ (a + c) = a + (b ⊓ c)
forall a b c : Q, (a + b) ⊓ (a + c) = a + (b ⊓ c)

contents: Lemma Qabs_nonneg@{} : forall q : Q, 0 <= abs q.
intros q;destruct (total_abs_either q) as [E|E];destruct E as [E1 E2];rewrite E2.
Lemma Qabs_nonpos_0@{} : forall q : Q, abs q <= 0 -> q = 0.

goals.conclusion: forall q : Q, abs q ≤ 0 -> q = 0
forall q : Q, abs q ≤ 0 -> q = 0

contents: pose proof (antisymmetry le _ _ E (Qabs_nonneg _)) as E1.
destruct (total_abs_either q) as [[E2 E3]|[E2 E3]];rewrite E3 in E1.
Lemma Qabs_0_or_pos : forall q : Q, q = 0 |_| 0 < abs q.
Lemma Qabs_of_nonneg@{} : forall q : Q, 0 <= q -> abs q = q.

goals.conclusion: forall q : Q, 0 ≤ q -> abs q = q
forall q : Q, 0 ≤ q -> abs q = q

contents: Lemma Qabs_of_nonpos : forall q : Q, q <= 0 -> abs q = - q.

goals.conclusion: forall q : Q, q ≤ 0 -> abs q = - q
forall q : Q, q ≤ 0 -> abs q = - q

contents: Lemma Qabs_le_raw@{} : forall x : Q, x <= abs x.

goals.conclusion: forall x : Q, x ≤ abs x
forall x : Q, x ≤ abs x

contents: intros x;destruct (total_abs_either x) as [[E1 E2]|[E1 E2]].
Lemma Qabs_neg@{} : forall x : Q, abs (- x) = abs x.

goals.conclusion: forall x : Q, abs (- x) = abs x
forall x : Q, abs (- x) = abs x

contents: Lemma Qabs_le_neg_raw : forall x : Q, - x <= abs x.

goals.conclusion: forall x : Q, - x ≤ abs x
forall x : Q, - x ≤ abs x

contents: Lemma Q_abs_le_pr@{} : forall x y : Q, abs x <= y <-> - y <= x /\ x <= y.

goals.conclusion: forall x y : Q, abs x ≤ y <-> - y ≤ x ≤ y
forall x y : Q, abs x ≤ y <-> - y ≤ x ≤ y
abs x ≤ y -> - y ≤ x ≤ y
- y ≤ x ≤ y -> abs x ≤ y
abs x ≤ y -> - y ≤ x ≤ y
- y ≤ x ≤ y -> abs x ≤ y

contents: destruct (total_abs_either x) as [[E3 E4]|[E3 E4]];rewrite E4.
Lemma Qabs_is_join@{} : forall q : Q, abs q = join (- q) q.

goals.conclusion: forall q : Q, abs q = - q ⊔ q
forall q : Q, abs q = - q ⊔ q

contents: destruct (total_abs_either q) as [[E1 E2]|[E1 E2]];rewrite E2.

Lemma Qlt_join : forall a b c : Q, a < c -> b < c ->
  join a b < c.

goals.conclusion: forall a b c : Q, a < c -> b < c -> a ⊔ b < c
forall a b c : Q, a < c -> b < c -> a ⊔ b < c

contents: intros a b c E1 E2.

destruct (total le a b) as [E3|E3];rewrite ?(join_r _ _ E3),?(join_l _ _ E3);
trivial.
Lemma Q_average_between@{} : forall q r : Q, q < r -> q < (q + r) / 2 < r.

goals.conclusion: forall q r : Q, q < r -> q < (q + r) / 2 < r
forall q r : Q, q < r -> q < (q + r) / 2 < r

contents: assert (Hrw : (q + r) / 2 - q = (r - q) / 2);[|rewrite Hrw;clear Hrw].
assert (Hrw : r - (q + r) / 2 = (r - q) / 2);[|rewrite Hrw;clear Hrw].
Lemma path_avg_split_diff_l (q r : Q) : q + ((r - q) / 2) = (r + q) / 2.
Lemma path_avg_split_diff_r (q r : Q) : r - ((r - q) / 2) = (r + q) / 2.

Lemma pos_gt_both : forall a b : Q, forall e, a < ' e -> b < ' e ->
  exists d d', a < ' d /\ b < ' d /\ e = d + d'.

goals.conclusion:

contents: Lemma Q_triangle_le : forall q r : Q, abs (q + r) <= abs q + abs r.

goals.conclusion: forall q r : Q, abs (q + r) ≤ abs q + abs r
forall q r : Q, abs (q + r) ≤ abs q + abs r
abs (q + r) ≤ abs q + abs r
- (q + r) ⊔ (q + r) ≤ abs q + abs r
q + r ≤ abs q + abs r
- q - r ≤ abs q + abs r
q + r ≤ abs q + abs r

contents: Lemma Qabs_triangle_alt_aux : forall x y : Q, abs x - abs y <= abs (x - y).

goals.conclusion: forall x y : Q, abs x - abs y ≤ abs (x - y)
forall x y : Q, abs x - abs y ≤ abs (x - y)
abs q - abs r ≤ abs (q - r)
abs q - abs r + abs r ≤ abs (q - r) + abs r
abs q ≤ abs (q - r) + abs r

contents: Lemma Qabs_triangle_alt : forall x y : Q, abs (abs x - abs y) <= abs (x - y).

goals.conclusion: forall x y : Q, abs (abs x - abs y) ≤ abs (x - y)
forall x y : Q, abs (abs x - abs y) ≤ abs (x - y)
abs (abs q - abs r) ≤ abs (q - r)
- (abs q - abs r) ⊔ (abs q - abs r) ≤ abs (q - r)
abs q - abs r ≤ abs (q - r)
abs r - abs q ≤ abs (r - q)
abs q - abs r ≤ abs (q - r)

contents: Lemma Q_dense@{} : forall q r : Q, q < r -> exists s, q < s < r.

goals.conclusion: forall q r : Q, q < r -> {s : Q & q < s < r}
forall q r : Q, q < r -> {s : Q & q < s < r}

contents: Lemma Qabs_neg_flip@{} : forall a b : Q, abs (a - b) = abs (b - a).

goals.conclusion: forall a b : Q, abs (a - b) = abs (b - a)
forall a b : Q, abs (a - b) = abs (b - a)

contents:
Definition pos_of_Q : Q -> Q+
  := fun q => {| pos := abs q + 1;
    is_pos := le_lt_trans _ _ _ (Qabs_nonneg q)
                (fst (pos_plus_lt_compat_r _ _) lt_0_1) |}.

Lemma Q_abs_plus_1_bounds@{} : forall q : Q,
  - ' (pos_of_Q q) ≤ q
  ≤ ' (pos_of_Q q).

goals.conclusion: forall q : Q, - ' pos_of_Q q ≤ q ≤ ' pos_of_Q q
forall q : Q, - ' pos_of_Q q ≤ q ≤ ' pos_of_Q q

contents: Lemma Qabs_mult@{} : forall a b : Q, abs (a * b) = abs a * abs b.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : Q, abs (a * b) = abs a * abs b
forall a b : Q, abs (a * b) = abs a * abs b
abs (a * b) = abs a * abs b

destruct (total_abs_either a) as [Ea|Ea];destruct Ea as [Ea1 Ea2];rewrite Ea2;
destruct (total_abs_either b) as [Eb|Eb];destruct Eb as [Eb1 Eb2];rewrite Eb2.
Lemma Qpos_neg_le@{} : forall a : Q+, - ' a <= ' a.
Definition Qpos_upper (e : Q+) := exists x : Q, ' e <= x.
Definition Qpos_upper_inject e : Q -> Qpos_upper e.
#[export] Instance QLe_dec : forall q r : Q, Decidable (q <= r).

goals.conclusion: forall q r : Q, Decidable (q ≤ r)
forall q r : Q, Decidable (q ≤ r)

contents: #[export] Instance QLt_dec : forall q r : Q, Decidable (q < r).

goals.conclusion: forall q r : Q, Decidable (q < r)
forall q r : Q, Decidable (q < r)
forall b : Q+, merely (hfiber Qpos_enumerator b)
forall b : Q+, merely {x : nat & Qpos_enumerator x = b}

Tr (-1) (hfiber (enumerator Q) (' e)) ->
merely {x : nat & Qpos_enumerator x = e}
hfiber (enumerator Q) (' e) -> merely {x : nat & Qpos_enumerator x = e}

match le_or_lt (enumerator Q n) 0 with
| inl _ => 1
| inr l => {| pos := enumerator Q n; is_pos := l |}
end = e
{| pos := enumerator Q n; is_pos := E1 |} = e
{| pos := enumerator Q n; is_pos := E1 |} = e
